full_description: WaterBuddy is an app that helps users stay hydrated by tracking their daily water intake. It sends reminders to drink water throughout the day, ensuring you meet your hydration goals. With WaterBuddy, you can set your own daily water targets, log your water intake, and view your progress over time. The app also allows you to customize the reminder schedule to fit your lifestyle. Stay healthy and hydrated with WaterBuddy!
